---
title: "Cadabra and Quarto: A Test"
bibliography: "references.bib"
csl: "myrefs.csl"
---

This is a Quarto website that uses [Cadabra](https://cadabra.science) for calculations @Peeters:2007wn.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.

If everything in [this page](test_covariant_derivative.qmd) works, you should see the covariant derivative of a tensor in terms of the partial derivative and the Christoffel symbols, as well as some ADM kinematics expressions.

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
